(Tetraxylopteris, (Archaeopteris, Cercropsis), Elkinsia, Laceya, (Bilignea, Lyrasperma),

(Ephedra, Welwitschia, Gnetum), (Glossopterids, Pentoxylon), Bennettitales, Caytonia,

(Chloranthaceae, Laurales), Austrobaileya, Magnoliaceae, Eupomatia)
